author.bio: #IPFS Core Dev. Peer-2-Peer Engineer and Researcher @protocollabs: @mineFilecoin @libp2p @ipld | P2P http://M.Sc. Lecturer at @istecnico. Made @lxjs & @startupscholars
author.name: David Dias

content.text:
We've just published a post about our participation at the NDN Seminar (Named Data Networking). 

It packs 24 very inquisitive questions and answers about #IPFS & #libp2p
https://research.protocol.ai/blog/2020/ndn-seminar-a-high-level-overview-of-the-interplanetary-file-system/
We hope you enjoy it and that helps you build your understanding of IPFS & libp2p:)
